title: Block Diagram Protocol Schema
description: This schema is used to validate the JSON file that is used to store the block diagram protocol.

Spaces.description: A list of spaces in the block diagram protocol that follow the space schema.
Spaces.title: Spaces

Blocks.description: A list of blocks in the block diagram protocol that follow the block schema.
Blocks.title: Blocks

ConcreteBlocks.description: A list of concrete blocks in the block diagram protocol that follow the concrete block schema.
ConcreteBlocks.title: ConcreteBlocks

Wires.description: A list of wires in the block diagram protocol that follow the wire schema.
Wires.title: Wires

Systems.description: A list of systems in the block diagram protocol that follow the system schema.
Systems.title: Systems
